1. tas cl. 4. ˚syati, to fade away, perish,  Dhātup. xxvi, 103 ;
(cf. √taṃs) to cast upwards (or ‘to throw down’),  ib.  ( Vop. );
to throw,  Pāṇ. iii, 4, 61 ,  Kāś.

results.rendered_html:
tas 4 P. (tasyati)
1 To fade away, become exhausted.
2 To throw down.
3 To wane, decay, perish.
4 To reject, cast. [cf. Eng. toss.]
